section: Section 8A NHAI Act, read with Rule 115 of National Highways Fees (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008.

hybrid_lanes.permitted: Maximum of 1 lane on each side of the toll plaza can be operated as a hybrid lane to accept cash/oversized vehicle payments.
hybrid_lanes.penalty_hybrid: FASTag-compliant vehicles entering the hybrid lane are charged single toll, while cash vehicles entering FASTag-only lanes pay double toll.

requirements: Proof of residence within 20km of toll plaza

blacklist_rules: Balance falls below minimum reserve threshold (typically ₹150 for cars).
Linked wallet is restricted due to pending KYC verification.
Vehicle registration plate mismatch detected by toll plaza RFID-coupled camera.
